devices.evidence_notes: Model family is a DSL-capable modem/router.
devices.ambiguity_notes: May be used behind a fiber ONT as an Ethernet router; model alone does not prove the active WAN.

devices.evidence_notes: VR series models are DSL-capable modem/routers.
devices.ambiguity_notes: The Ethernet WAN port can be used behind another CPE; require DSL/PTM/ATM evidence to confirm VDSL/ADSL.
Model evidence is strong but optical interface state or PON telemetry is required for final confirmation.
Confirm with optical/PON interface evidence when possible.
Final confirmation should come from DOCSIS MIB/channel evidence.

devices.evidence_notes: Known LTE/5G fixed wireless CPE family.
devices.ambiguity_notes: Confirm with LTE/NR/WWAN interface state when locally exposed.

devices.evidence_notes: May be used as WISP CPE or ordinary Ethernet router.
devices.ambiguity_notes: Model alone is ambiguous; require radio bridge/interface evidence for WISP.
